name: Academy Accreditation - Databricks Fundamentals
description:
Earners of the Databricks Fundamentals accreditation have demonstrated the understanding of fundamental concepts related to Databricks Data Intelligence Platform.

Share your accomplishment on LinkedIn and tag us #DatabricksLearning. We'll be selecting random winners who tag us for Databricks swag. 

EARNING CRITERIA
Completion of a short assessment on fundamental concepts related to the Databricks Lakehouse Platform.
